name: the-graph-token-api-mcp
description: Official MCP server that turns The Graph’s Token API into a plug-and-play web3 data tool. Exposes ERC-20 & NFT metadata, balances, transfers, top-holder stats, prices, and more, allowing LLMs to run SQL queries on structured and indexed blockchain data.
